name: Badge of the Brotherhood
implicitMods: You can apply an additional Curse
explicitMods: Your Maximum Frenzy Charges is equal to your Maximum Power Charges
8% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate of Travel Skills per Frenzy Charge
8% increased Effect of Elusive on you per Power Charge
25% chance to lose a Frenzy Charge when you use a Travel Skill
25% chance to lose a Power Charge when you gain Elusive
flavourText: Greater than any blade, agility and intellect will be your weapons.

name: Dreadarc
explicitMods: Curse Enemies with Flammability on Hit
flavourText: The fastest way to a man's heart
is through his sternum.

typeLine: Dabbler's Bismuth Flask of the Owl
explicitMods: 63% reduced Effect of Curses on you during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Void Battery
explicitMods: 25% increased Spell Damage per Power Charge
flavourText: "The trick is to give nothingness,
and to receive everything in return."
- Inquisitor Maligaro

properties.name: Spell, Movement, Duration, Fire, Travel, Blink

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving a trail of burning ground. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods: Deals 1738.6 Base Fire Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses all targets in an area, reducing their accuracy and making them deal less damage.
explicitMods: Cursed enemies have 19% reduced Accuracy Rating
Cursed Normal or Magic enemies deal 29% less Damage
Cursed Rare or Unique enemies deal 18% less Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Engulfs you in magical fire that rapidly burns you and nearby enemies. Your spell damage is substantially increased while under this effect. The effect ends when you have 1 life remaining.
explicitMods: Deals 70% of your Maximum Life as Base Fire Damage per second
Deals 70% of your Maximum Energy Shield as Base Fire Damage per second
You Burn for 90% of your Maximum Life per second as Fire Damage
You Burn for 70% of your Maximum Energy Shield per second as Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods:
Sacrifices 60% of your total Energy Shield and Life
Deals 158% of Sacrificed Energy Shield and Life as Fire Damage per second
Modifiers to Skill Effect Duration also apply to this Skill's Soul Gain Prevention
hybrid.secDescrText: Sacrifices a portion of your Life and Energy Shield to engulf you in magical fire that rapidly burns nearby enemies for a duration. Your spell damage is increased while under this effect.

name: Vengeance Claw
implicitMods: Inflict Cold Exposure on Hit, applying -14% to Cold Resistance

49% increased Damage with Hits against Chilled Enemies
craftedMods: 28% increased Damage during any Flask Effect

socketedItems.secDescrText: Detonates a Mine, starting a Detonation Sequence which will detonate other Mines around it.

First Mine Detonates Instantly
Mines get 10% more Detonation Speed for each prior Mine in Detonation Sequence
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the quality of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: While this skill is active, supported spells will be repeatedly triggered.
explicitMods: Each Supported Spell will Trigger when its Cooldown is over
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Supported Skills have 1% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
Supported Spells are Triggered when their Cooldowns are over
hybrid.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that are instant and have no reservation. Cannot support Vaal skills or skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a Stone Golem that grants you life regeneration and defences. In addition to its melee attack, the Stone Golem uses a rolling charge and a powerful slam that can taunt enemies.
explicitMods: Golems grant 110 Life Regenerated per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Circle of Guilt
explicitMods: Herald of Purity has 60% increased Buff Effect
70% increased Physical Damage while affected by Herald of Purity
flavourText: I feel the moral weight of what I must do to protect Wraeclast.
I accept my guilt without shame. It is my gift to humanity.

typeLine: Dabbler's Silver Flask of Bog Moss
explicitMods: 55% chance to Avoid being Shocked during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

Count as having maximum number of Frenzy Charges

simple ethos: why make the effort, when
you can simply mimic what others have?

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a Lightning Golem that grants you increased attack and cast speed, and mana regeneration. The Lightning Golem fires a projectile spell, creates orbs of Lightning that zap nearby enemies, and casts a temporary aura that grants added Lightning Damage to spells and attacks used by the Golem and its nearby allies.
explicitMods: Golems grant 10% increased Attack and Cast Speed
Golems grant 18.6 Mana Regenerated per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff which lets you deal more physical damage. When you kill an enemy while you have this buff, this skill will summon a Sentinel of Purity, or refresh the duration and life of an existing one instead if you have the maximum number of them. The Sentinels of Purity have a single-target melee attack and an area melee attack.
explicitMods: Summon a Sentinel of Purity when you Kill an Enemy
20% chance to Summon a Sentinel of Purity when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a Flame Golem that grants you increased Damage and Area of Effect. The Flame Golem can cast a fire spray, a wave of fire damage, and an explosive arcing projectile.

new life will emerge, and that life will kill, and so on..."

I did it for love.
And I'd do it again in an instant.
